chapters.title: Figure 1. The Three-Stage Planetary Trigger Framework

chapters.title: A. Neechabhanga Raja Yoga (Cancellation of Debilitation)
chapters.content_preview: A. Neechabhanga Raja Yoga (Cancellation of Debilitation)  The dispositor (lord of the sign where the planet is debilitated) sits in a Kendra (houses 1, 4, 7, 10) relative to either the Ascendant or the Moon.  The planet that gets exalted in the current sign sits in a Kendra house

chapters.title: Blemish / Yoga
chapters.content_preview: Blemish / Yoga  Core Classical Mechanism  Neutralization Condition  Kuja Dosha(Martial Affliction)

chapters.title: Core Classical Mechanism
chapters.content_preview: Core Classical Mechanism  Neutralization Condition  Kuja Dosha(Martial Affliction)  Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, or 12 causing relational friction.

chapters.title: Neutralization Condition
chapters.content_preview: Neutralization Condition  Kuja Dosha(Martial Affliction)  Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, or 12 causing relational friction.  Canceled if Mars sits in Aries, Scorpio, or Capricorn, or if conjoined with/aspected by Jupiter or Venus.

chapters.title: Kuja Dosha(Martial Affliction)
chapters.content_preview: Kuja Dosha(Martial Affliction)  Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, or 12 causing relational friction.  Canceled if Mars sits in Aries, Scorpio, or Capricorn, or if conjoined with/aspected by Jupiter or Venus.  Kendradhipati Dosha(Angular Lordship)

chapters.title: Kendradhipati Dosha(Angular Lordship)
chapters.content_preview: Kendradhipati Dosha(Angular Lordship)  Natural benefics losing their auspicious nature when owning an angular house.  Completely neutralized if the planet is placed in its own sign or an exaltation sign, or sits in a trinal house.  Kemadruma Yoga(Lunar Isolation)

chapters.title: Kemadruma Yoga(Lunar Isolation)
chapters.content_preview: Kemadruma Yoga(Lunar Isolation)  The Moon lacks flanking planets in adjacent houses, indicating psychological isolation.  Canceled if any planet occupies a Kendra from the Ascendant, or if the Moon is aspected by a strong Jupiter.  6. Advanced Edge Cases & Complex Combinations
